'''鈭歱-t-v-g''' ('''kapatvegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zouk|zouk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zouk|zouk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-t-v-g
|-
! Lemma
| kapatvegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
